title: senecio longifolius
intro: Senecio longifolius, also known as Long-leaved Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its long, narrow leaves and yellow daisy-like flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio longifolius are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
